headline: Barclays Boosts Public Storage (PSA) Target to $347 as Scotiabank Also Raises Forecast
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 5, Barclays raised the firm’s price recommendation on Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) to $347 from $331. It maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm updated its models for self-storage real estate investment trusts following the Q4 reports. […]
